title: Reduced Price | 2-Bed For Sale | Little Upgraded
raw_area: Golden Mile 1, Golden Mile, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
Welcome to Golden Mile 1, an exceptional 2-bedroom apartment nestled in the heart of Palm Jumeirah. Experience luxury living in this beautifully designed residence, featuring expansive spaces and breathtaking views of the landmark skyline. 

Key Highlights:
- Layout: 2 Bedrooms, 4 Bathrooms, Maid's Room
- Built-up Area: 1,799 Sq.ft
- Furnishings: Built-in Kitchen Appliances, Built-in Wardrobes
- Amenities: Central A/C & Heating, Concierge Service, Shared Gym, Shared Spa
- Parking: Dedicated Covered Parking
- Rented until 11th June 2026

Nearby Facilities:
Nearest school: Innoventures School – 1.5 km  
Nearest restaurant: The Noodle House – 750 m  
Nearest airport: Dubai International Airport – 30 km  

This apartment is the epitome of comfortable living, showcasing a functional layout paired with premium finishes that cater to both families and professionals. The vibrant community of Palm Jumeirah offers a wealth of entertainment and leisure options, allowing residents to enjoy a truly luxurious lifestyle.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to call Golden Mile 1 home. Contact Keyway Real Estate LLC today for more information or to schedule a viewing!

ai_analysis.quality_context: Priced at AED 2,057 per sqft, this property sits approximately 39% below the Palm Jumeirah market median of AED 3,370 per sqft. While the 1,799 sqft layout is exceptionally generous for a 2-bedroom apartment, the steep discount and 'little upgraded' description strongly indicate the property is located in an older, high-density development on the Trunk (such as Shoreline Apartments or Golden Mile) rather than a premium newer build. The minor upgrades suggest cosmetic rather than structural improvements, meaning the unit may still require capital expenditure to compete with modern luxury standards on the Palm.
risk_flags: Significant underpricing (39% below median) may indicate undesirable views (e.g., highway/monorail facing), low floor placement, or active litigation/disputes.
The 'little upgraded' status often masks aging MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) infrastructure typical of older Palm Jumeirah developments.
High historical service charges in older Palm Jumeirah buildings can heavily compress net rental yields.
Potential for upcoming special levies or building-wide maintenance assessments by the developer or owners' association.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: This property represents a classic value-add opportunity with a highly attractive entry point into Dubai's most prestigious master community. Buying at a 39% discount to the market median provides a significant margin of safety and strong potential for capital appreciation. To maximize ROI, an investor should budget for a comprehensive, high-end renovation to reposition the asset for the premium short-term holiday home market or luxury long-term rental. Acquisition is highly recommended subject to clean title deed verification, service charge audit, and a thorough physical inspection.

Location and Connectivity:

Kamoon 1 is nestled within Old Town, a characterful Arabian-style enclave at the heart of Downtown Dubai. The building sits steps from Souk Al Bahar and within easy reach of the Burj Khalifa, the Dubai Fountain, Dubai Opera, and The Dubai Mall  one of the world's largest retail and dining destinations. Sheikh Mohammed bin Rashid Boulevard offers an outstanding array of luxury retail outlets, fine-dining restaurants, and trendy cafes, while Spinneys and Carrefour Market provide everyday convenience close by.

Downtown Dubai offers excellent connectivity via direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road (E11) and Financial Centre Road (D71), linking residents seamlessly to Business Bay, DIFC, and beyond. The Burj Khalifa/Dubai Mall Metro Station on the Red Line is easily accessible, and the community's pedestrian-friendly streets make walking a pleasure.

description:
MIRA PRESENTS:
The Royal Atlantis Resort and Residences At Palm Jumeirah

The Royal Atlantis Residences is a prestigious luxury development located on Palm Jumeirah in Dubai, offering an array of amenities for contemporary 2-bedroom apartments. Here are some of the amenities you can expect:

- Stunning Views of the Arabian Gulf and Dubai skyline.
- Modern and Stylish Interior Design with high-end finishes.
- Private Balcony or Terrace for outdoor living.
- Infinity pools.
- State-of-the-art Fitness Center with personal trainers.
- Spa and Wellness Centers for relaxation.
- On-site Restaurants and Cafes offering various cuisines.
- Professional Concierge Services for residents.
- Smart Home Technology for convenience and security.
- Covered Parking for residents convenience.
- Panoramic Elevators for stunning views.

title: Incredible Renovation | Full Sea View | Great Buy
raw_area: Atlantis The Royal Residences, The Crescent, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai
description:
Turnkey Coastal Serenity with Sunset Views!    
      
Luxury Residences—Dubai’s leading resale and rental agency for Atlantis The Royal Residences and part of the original development sales team—presents this exceptional turnkey home within the new icon of Dubai.   
     
Perfectly positioned to capture golden sunsets, this private residence boasts uninterrupted views across the Arabian Gulf and exquisitely landscaped gardens. Every element has been thoughtfully curated and meticulously enhanced by its current owner to elevate comfort, sophistication, and modern functionality. 
 
Residents of Atlantis The Royal enjoy exclusive Black Tier membership privileges such as 30% discount level to the resort restaurants and spa treatments, and effortless access to world-class amenities, including Michelin-starred dining by global icons, private beach, indoor and outdoor pools, spa and wellness garden, sauna and steam rooms, tennis court, elegant library, resident lounges, business suites, BBQ area with outdoor kitchen, and a state-of-the-art Technogym fitness centre.

The experience is complemented by valet parking, 24-hour concierge services, and a level of discretion and attention to detail found only in the world’s finest 5* branded residences.

Arrange your private viewing today and experience the very definition of coastal elegance and refined living at Atlantis The Royal Residences.
